data.name: Title
data.value: See the health of your identity system at a glance.

data.name: Lead
data.value: Track people, connected apps, and key access health signals from one overview before opening the detailed pages.

data.name: TotalUsersLead
data.value: All people who can currently sign in to this workspace.

data.name: AdminCoverageLead
data.value: {0} of {1} people currently have elevated access.

data.name: TotalClientsLead
data.value: Applications and services currently connected to your sign-in platform.

data.name: ConfiguredScopesLead
data.value: {0} access rules are currently shaping what connected apps can request.

data.name: ClientMixLead
data.value: See how sign-in apps, background services, and access rules are distributed without leaving this overview.

data.name: QuickActionsTitle
data.value: Open the pages you use most

data.name: ManageUsersLead
data.value: Review people, access levels, and who can make sensitive changes.

data.name: ManageClientsLead
data.value: Review connected apps, sign-in settings, and the permissions they rely on.

data.name: RegisterClientLead
data.value: Add a new app or service connection for an internal integration.

data.name: GuidanceOne
data.value: Choose the sign-in experience that matches the product so people get a smooth login flow from the first click.

data.name: GuidanceTwo
data.value: Keep each service connection limited to the access it truly needs so maintenance stays simple and safe.

data.name: GuidanceThree
data.value: Before launch, verify redirect addresses and permission settings so every integration behaves the way people expect.

data.name: AccessLimitedTitle
data.value: This overview isn't available right now.

data.name: AccessLimitedLead
data.value: Sign in with an account that can open this workspace overview to see the latest summary.
